---
title: "URSSI Research Software Engineering Best Practices"
subtitle: "7/15/2026 DBMI RSE-CoP Meeting"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dracula
    incremental: true
author:
  - name: "Jess Murphy"
    email: "jessica.murphy@cuanschutz.edu"
  - name: "Sarah D. Slack"
    email: "sarah.slack@cuanschutz.edu"
---

## URSSI Summer School

- URSSI = US Research Software Sustainability Institute
- Credit for this presentation: (Summer School 2026)[https://github.com/si2-urssi/summerschool-June2026]

## Managing Environments

- testing Sarah slide
- test
- test

## Software Design & Modularity

- test
  - test another Sarah slide

## Structuring Python Packages


## Collaboration with Git/GitHub/Workflows


## Testing & Continuous Integration, Linting

**Sarah slide test bold no bullet point**
*test italic no bullet point*

## Peer Code Review

Sarah final test slide

## Documentation and Versioning


## Open Science & Software Citation
